title: The South Bird Hunt
description: The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.
scene: Across pages 19, 20, 21, 22, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Bellamy, Masira, Shojo, Luffy. The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Yeah, heard he found some recently.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: What's all this fuss about gold now?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Why don'cha tell me more about him...

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: It's time to work up a sweat!

summary: The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.
